reviews.review_description: I absolutely loved this game and i hope it will come back some day
Please bring it back it was so fun
I got a 3s since my brother recommended this game just to find the servers down, cmon guys :|
It was so fun please bring it back

reviews.review_title: Please bring the severs back up
reviews.review_description: I loved the game and have so many memories I saw it in my deleted tried playing and the game shut down but I miss it so much please bring it back up
I miss this game, seeing it shut down but I know the reason. The game used to be free, how I got it. Once it costed money the player count fell, and so did the game.
Hopefully it's not available for purchase because it doesn't work anymore.
This game is cool and I like the graphics and the gameplay and the horses and the guns are very cool
The game is dead

reviews.review_title: Don’t mind paying. We want more horses
reviews.review_description: When are you doing to update this game and bring it back to life. Had so much potential
It keeps say network error please login again  but I've tried I even reseted my internet

developer_response.body:
Hi sorry about the network error, this bug already got fixed, wish you a great time in SPARK! Besides, this is only the beta version, and it's free to play now, so if you encounter any issue, or need any support, please contact us on FB https://www.facebook.com/SparkVRGame, Twitter @@SPARKvrgame or Discord https://discord.gg/hUtVz3FdFA
We are always happy to help!

reviews.review_title: Good enough!! Potential to be the TOP!
reviews.review_description:
Good enough!! Very potential to be my top game! Don't hesitate to try, and it's free now, what you waiting for!?

the PVP mode is great!! it's very different compared to other FPS games, I feel unique and couldn't help to play more. And the current 3 maps are so different, that you have to choose different weapons and team strategies to play. Haven't unlock the Riding Battle, can't wait to ride my own horse while shooting! Feel so sick!!
Really looking forward the finished version, not sure about the new mode, but wont be bad based on current quality!  

Good job SPARK team! Everyone who is hesitating, please have a try, you won't regret!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are so honored to hear that! This game is still under development, so if everyone has any feedback or suggestions, please feel no hesitation to let us know! Discord: https://discord.gg/hUtVz3FdFA

reviews.review_description: I like this game it’s really cool, but there are a lot of things to fix. Firstly can you add free head movement because it’s kind of annoying how I can’t peek around corners and I have to actually move my character around the corner.  Secondly, can you fix the sounds? ex: there was some guy at the other side of the map just shooting, but it sounded like he was right behind me or right in front of me. Thirdly, sometimes when people disconnect or leave their character just stays there like a ghost. Finally, can you use voice acting for the girl at the beginning because it’s kind of creepy how robotic she sounds. Other than that I think the game is pretty good it has a lot of potential and I think you just need more time to work on the game to make it even better!

reviews.review_title: Can't believe this is so polished
reviews.review_description: The UI is smooth. The tutorial is just enough to quickly learn but not long enough to say "shut up already". The matchmaking is fair and quick. The lobbies are friendly. Not one glitch is an almost hour long session. No bad sports. I was very impressed, for a new game, how clear and concise the vision was. Tons to build on. Only played for a bit and I'm excited to unlock more. But even more excited to see what the future holds for this very promising and surprising title. Free is amazing for what they offer. You have nothing to lose and will be hootin and hollerin in no time. Just get it.

developer_response.body: Thank you! There are still lots of work for us to make SPARK grow! We really appreciate any support at this early stage! Thank you!

reviews.review_title: Great game although Audio isn’t the best
reviews.review_description: This game is really fun the leveling up unlocking crates that let You use guns for a few days is a unique idea the only bad thing about this game is how the audio and microphone work if you’re in a party with someone you barely can hear them because the music and people talking is so loud and there’s no way to adjust it￼
I passed at 3 in the morning due to the volume being too loud... Thats why I gave it a 1 star
This is the first time I've ever loved a FPS game. So fun! And I actually did feel immersed to some extent. More than I normally do. No motion sickness at all!

reviews.review_title: It good but sever are laggy
reviews.review_description: Is really good with all the mechanics ￼servers are really bad though time when a match finish, I always get network you really need to fix it ￼
It is literally Nothing Like the trailer Way Better interesting Graphics are better than the trailer I love it
Best game ever because ame is helping
